title: Razen's Tension Weaponary
description: New Tension based weapons to spice up minecraft combat
body:
# About the mod
This mod attempts to diversify Tension weapons - the Crossbow and Bow - by adding new variations with their own set of features

Although it focuses on new weapons, the main idea is to expand Minecraft's combat with new weapons and projectiles while expanding projectile behavior, letting them interact with the player and between each other in new and improved ways while also adding new movement options for the player

Currently, there are only **2** new weapons, but more are planned to come in the future

## Deadbeat's Crossbow
![Deadbeat's Crossbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ffa361462e7a46bb180e8b91d7c0bbee67f89c6.png)

Being able to hold multiple charges at a time, this old desing uses technology from the Trial Chambers for enhanced projectile compability, letting you mix and match, by default, 3 diferent charges from a wider array of ammo types.

While it does support Multishot and Quick Charge, it has it's own set of new enchantments that play around projectile behaviour.

### Projectiles Supported :

- Arrows
- Tipped Arrows
- Spectral Arrows
- Fireworks
- Snowballs
- Eggs
- WindCharges
- FireCharges
- Copper Discs
- End Crystal

Tip: While this weapon already allows for new creative ways to combat enemies, by mixing up the projectiles in the chamber, it shines best when the projectiles themselves are combined with movement or other projectiles

Here is a list of some projectiles interactions
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- ~~rocket~~ Wind Jumping
  > Windcharges now add a new **STRAFE** effect, letting you conserve your momentum and strafe in the air
  
- Snow Burst
  > By combining any *WindCharge* with a *Snowball* from this crossbow, a special **Snow** explosion occurs.

- Fire Burst
  > By combining any *WindCharge* with a *FireCharge* from this crossbow, a special **Fire** explosion occurs

- Fire Airshots
  > If hitting a entity in the air, a **Red** explosion may happen, dealing *heavy damage* and destruction

- Ender Burst
  > By combining any *WindCharge* with an *EnderPearl* from this crossbow, a special **Ender** explosion occurs, prepeling you in the enderpearl's direction

- Ender Swap
  > Hitting Entities with an *Enderpearl* from this crossbow **Swaps** both the *user* and *target* position

- Disc Skipping
  > Copper discs bounce on water

- Crystal Triggering
  > Hitting a End Crystal Projectile trigger's it early
</details>

## Copper Disc

![Copper Disc with Pigstep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9145cc2d63b028f30b233d0e276791b3ebedecc.png)

Not being a Tension weapon, this disc accepts music discs for customization and ranged jukebox interaction.

It serves as a boomerang, bouncing of entities and coming back to you, while being able to be redirected into any living entity nearby if punched.

## New Potion Effects

- Strafe Potion
- Unstable Strafe Potion
